blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,287 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
